The '''oozhith''' was a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] creature that was worn by members of the [[Shaper caste]]. It had cilia on the outside as well as the inside, which sought out and fed on microorganisms in the air, creating a subtle shimmer to the surface as they moved. The full-body oozhith was only worn by [[Master Shaper]]s, however, with [[Shaper Adept]]s wearing a sleeveless version that ended above the knees. The oozhith had a small pouch for equipment.<ref name="EoVI" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth]]''
